## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer lint` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] README / docs updated if public API changed
- [ ] No AI attribution lines (no `Co-Authored-By: Claude`, no "Generated with [tool]")
- [ ] Commit messages are short and use Conventional Commits prefixes
